Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are to create a temporal profile for a supply chain process with the given activities The activities are SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We must consider pairs of activities that eventually follow each other in at least one process execution

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: However note that the process is likely to be sequential but there might be some parallelism or rework Since the problem is about a global supply chain let us assume a typical sequential order with possible rework

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The typical order might be SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note that the temporal profile is not only for directly following activities but for any pair that eventually follows that is in the trace one comes after the other possibly with other activities in between

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Since we do not have real data we will make reasonable estimates based on common sense

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The problem says times between couples of activities so we consider the time from the completion of one activity to the completion of the next Or the start It is ambiguous

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Typically in process mining we consider the timestamp of the activity So let us assume we are considering the time difference between the timestamps of the two activities when they occur

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are to create a dictionary with keys as tuples of activity labels and values as average time standard deviation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The problem says construct a dictionary that includes a representative subset We should include pairs that are directly connected and also some that are separated by multiple steps

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let us assume the process is linear SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can break down the process into segments SS to OP 8 hours OP to RC 2 weeks RC to QI 1 hour QI to CA 2 hours CA to PT 4 hours PT to PK 1 hour PK to WS 30 minutes WS to DT 2 days DT to AS 30 days with corresponding standard deviations

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For pairs that are not adjacent we can sum the averages and take the square root of the sum of variances if we assume independence

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The standard deviation for a sum of independent random variables is the square root of the sum of the variances So if we have two steps with avg1 std1 and avg2 std2 then the total average is avg1 plus avg2 and the total standard deviation is sqrt std1 squared plus std2 squared

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each pair i j where i appears before j in the sequence we compute total average as the sum of averages of adjacent pairs between i and j and total standard deviation as the square root of the sum of squares of the standard deviations

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: However note that the problem says a representative subset but we can compute all to be thorough

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We have 10 activities so 45 pairs

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We assume that the process is linear and the times between consecutive activities are independent

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The problem does not specify if we should include the pair AS SS because in the next execution the process starts again But the process executions are independent so we are only considering within one execution So we do not include pairs where the first activity is after the second in the same execution

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The example uses seconds We will stick to seconds

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will create a dictionary for all pairs act i act j where i is before j For each such pair we find the consecutive steps between them and sum the averages and take the square root of the sum of squares of the standard deviations

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Example SS RC equals SS OP plus OP RC avg equals 1238400 std equals sqrt 7200 squared plus 259200 squared
